content: Ask your <1>{{productName}} admin</1> to connect and enable an AI provider in the {{productName}} settings to analyze form data with Ask AI, create charts, and uncover insights.

comment.text: Informational text within the AI card in the Form details view, instructing the user to contact their administrator to enable an AI provider. Includes a `{{productName}}` variable and a `<1>` tag for bolding the admin reference.
